constraints: All 3 languages (EN/ZH/TH) required in every NW_I18N.register call
data-i18n uses textContent (strips HTML) — use data-i18n-html for content with tags
NW_I18N.onChange callback fires AFTER core applies textContent — use setTimeout(0) to override with innerHTML
nw_lang localStorage key — never use a different key for language storage
Never generate [ZH]/[TH] placeholder prefixes — use English fallback directly. Prefixes are visible to users and look broken.

Battle must always give rewards — never zero. Even a loss gives 10 Gold consolation.
nw-battle-coach.js must load AFTER nw-battle-v7.js — it hooks into DOM elements created by battle init
nw-battle-assist.js must load AFTER nw-battle-v7.js; it reads window.NW_BATTLE API which is set at IIFE end
Assist skips all visuals when coach overlay is active (coachActive() checks for #coachOverlay)
